mapper.sql: select matter_id, matter_name, category, priority, dept_id, required_docs, expect_days, process_desc, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from comm_matter
mapper.insert: insert into comm_matter ( matter_name, category, priority, dept_id, required_docs, expect_days, process_desc, status, create_by, remark, create_time ) values ( #{matterName}, #{category}, #{priority}, #{deptId}, #{requiredDocs}, #{expectDays}, #{processDesc}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from comm_matter where matter_id in
#{id}
